texts.label: text
texts.orig: As a globally-recognized leader in zero liquid discharge (ZLD) with more than 160 installations, Aquatech has consistently innovated thermal and membrane technologies. Our newest solution, Advanced Vacuum Membrane Distillation (AVMD), combines both expertises to produce a thermal evaporation process optimized for direct treatment of RO reject or similar brine streams with some preconditioning. Furthermore, AVMD is able to effectively reduce brine volume & recover high quality distillate to meet either ZLD or Minimal Liquid Discharge (MLD) requirements.
texts.text: As a globally-recognized leader in zero liquid discharge (ZLD) with more than 160 installations, Aquatech has consistently innovated thermal and membrane technologies. Our newest solution, Advanced Vacuum Membrane Distillation (AVMD), combines both expertises to produce a thermal evaporation process optimized for direct treatment of RO reject or similar brine streams with some preconditioning. Furthermore, AVMD is able to effectively reduce brine volume & recover high quality distillate to meet either ZLD or Minimal Liquid Discharge (MLD) requirements.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Increasing regulations and pressure for industries around the world to achieve ZLD & MLD highlight a growing need for innovation in brine management technologies. Currently, conventional thermal evaporation technologies struggle to provide low-cost solutions  for customers due to high installation and maintenance costs. Through years of research, Aquatech's Advanced Vacuum Membrane Distillation (AVMD) process has successfully been developed to solve these issues and effectively create a solution for small-scale thermal evaporation needs.
texts.text: Increasing regulations and pressure for industries around the world to achieve ZLD & MLD highlight a growing need for innovation in brine management technologies. Currently, conventional thermal evaporation technologies struggle to provide low-cost solutions  for customers due to high installation and maintenance costs. Through years of research, Aquatech's Advanced Vacuum Membrane Distillation (AVMD) process has successfully been developed to solve these issues and effectively create a solution for small-scale thermal evaporation needs.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: AVMD uses modular configuration and proprietary membrane design to  substantially  drive  down  cost  of  ownership  for  small  ZLD  &  MLD facilities.  AVMD is particularly effective in applications where a significant CapEx advantage over conventional thermal evaporation technologies can be applied, or where there is a recoverable product such as a solvent or valuable material which can be recycled back to an upstream industrial production process.
texts.text: AVMD uses modular configuration and proprietary membrane design to  substantially  drive  down  cost  of  ownership  for  small  ZLD  &  MLD facilities.  AVMD is particularly effective in applications where a significant CapEx advantage over conventional thermal evaporation technologies can be applied, or where there is a recoverable product such as a solvent or valuable material which can be recycled back to an upstream industrial production process.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · High brine concentration and salt rejection abilities, allowing for >90% Recovery and low distillate TDS.
texts.text: High brine concentration and salt rejection abilities, allowing for >90% Recovery and low distillate TDS.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Lower CapEx than conventional thermal evaporation systems in low capacity applications due to its modular configuration.
texts.text: Lower CapEx than conventional thermal evaporation systems in low capacity applications due to its modular configuration.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Innovative design separates the membrane from the liquid/brine solution, eliminating membrane fouling and leading to a consistently high flux and distillate quality
texts.text: Innovative design separates the membrane from the liquid/brine solution, eliminating membrane fouling and leading to a consistently high flux and distillate quality

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · By minimizing the installation, commissioning, and operational costs, our AVMD system provides a highly cost-competitive solution.
texts.text: By minimizing the installation, commissioning, and operational costs, our AVMD system provides a highly cost-competitive solution.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Lower operating costs and footprint than conventional thermal evaporation technologies.
texts.text: Lower operating costs and footprint than conventional thermal evaporation technologies.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Consistent distillate quality even when dealing with high brine concentrations.
texts.text: Consistent distillate quality even when dealing with high brine concentrations.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Can handle all non-volatile organics and recycle them in cases where solvent/valuable material recovery is desired.
texts.text: Can handle all non-volatile organics and recycle them in cases where solvent/valuable material recovery is desired.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Design prevents membrane fouling at salt saturation, in contrast to conventional MD.
texts.text: Design prevents membrane fouling at salt saturation, in contrast to conventional MD.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Consistently high flux due to innovative design, more than double that of conventional MD.
texts.text: Consistently high flux due to innovative design, more than double that of conventional MD.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Superior effluent quality with 35% total solids, for further brine volume reduction or recovery.
texts.text: Superior effluent quality with 35% total solids, for further brine volume reduction or recovery.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Membrane is highly temperature-resistant, capable of handling up to 90°C feed water. Additionally, its durability allows for maximized operating life.
texts.text: Membrane is highly temperature-resistant, capable of handling up to 90°C feed water. Additionally, its durability allows for maximized operating life.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: * If not coming from RO reject stream, will need preconditioning
texts.text: * If not coming from RO reject stream, will need preconditioning

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Consistent product quality regardless of feed brine concentration, with recovery >90%.
texts.text: Consistent product quality regardless of feed brine concentration, with recovery >90%.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · High flux and elimination of membrane fouling through innovative design.
texts.text: High flux and elimination of membrane fouling through innovative design.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Compact footprint with limited infrastructure construction or modification required.
texts.text: Compact footprint with limited infrastructure construction or modification required.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Enhanced automation and remote monitoring for ease of operation and optimal efficiency.
texts.text: Enhanced automation and remote monitoring for ease of operation and optimal efficiency.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Ability to be integrated with direct solar energy or waste heat from plant.
texts.text: Ability to be integrated with direct solar energy or waste heat from plant.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Extensive experience with membrane filtration technology.
texts.text: Extensive experience with membrane filtration technology.
